level1_segments.summary: The assistant surgeon calibrates the Mako robotic arm and prepares instruments with brief pauses in between.
The assistant surgeon cleans and prepares the patient, handles drapes, and assists the head surgeon with intermittent short pauses.
The assistant surgeon prepares the patient and assists the head surgeon by holding drapes and instruments while touching the patient.
The assistant surgeon resumes touching the patient and holding surgical instruments with brief pauses in between.
The assistant surgeon prepares instruments and then engages in a prolonged period of holding instruments while touching the patient.
The assistant surgeon briefly handles a drill and other instruments to perform suturing on the patient, interspersed with short pauses.
The assistant surgeon alternates between preparing the patient and holding surgical instruments with brief idle gaps.
The assistant surgeon manages surgical drapes over several intervals separated by short pauses.
The assistant surgeon prepares the patient and adjusts the operating table with a brief pause in between.

level2_segments.summary: The assistant surgeon calibrates the robotic system and performs initial patient preparation and draping.
The assistant surgeon actively assists the main procedure by holding instruments and performing suturing tasks.
The assistant surgeon manages surgical drapes, prepares the patient, and adjusts the operating table during the final stages.

level1_segments.summary: The circulator nurse intermittently assists the scrub nurse with brief pauses in between.
The circulator nurse holds surgical instruments and assists the scrub nurse with short interruptions.
The circulator nurse intermittently holds surgical instruments and briefly assists the scrub nurse before a long pause.
The circulator nurse manipulates the operating table and assists the head surgeon with intermittent pauses.
The circulator nurse holds a surgical instrument, pauses, and then prepares the patient.
The circulator nurse holds surgical instruments and drapes while assisting the robot technician.
The circulator nurse intermittently holds surgical instruments with brief pauses in between.
The circulator nurse manipulates the C-arm and scans the patient.
The circulator nurse pauses briefly before adjusting the operating table.
The circulator nurse pauses and then briefly holds a surgical instrument.

level2_segments.summary: The circulator nurse provides continuous support by holding instruments and assisting the scrub nurse during the initial phase of the procedure.
The nurse transitions to manipulating the operating table, preparing the patient, and assisting the robot technician with draping.
The circulator nurse resumes instrument handling and performs imaging tasks by manipulating the C-arm and adjusting the operating table.

level1_segments.summary: The drill is transferred from the scrub nurse to the head surgeon for a series of drilling actions interspersed with brief pauses, before being returned to the nurse.
The drill remains idle while held by the scrub nurse for an extended period.
The head surgeon retrieves the drill to perform two short drilling sequences separated by a pause, then returns it to the scrub nurse.
After a long gap, the head surgeon briefly holds and uses the drill for a short drilling task before pausing.
The drill is passed from the scrub nurse to the assistant and then to the head surgeon, who performs a final sequence of drilling and holding actions.

level2_segments.summary: The drill is initially used by the head surgeon for a series of drilling actions and then remains idle while held by the scrub nurse for an extended period.
The drill undergoes a sequence of intermittent usage by the head surgeon, including retrieval, short drilling tasks, and a final handoff involving the assistant.

level1_segments.summary: The head surgeon prepares the patient and handles surgical instruments and drapes with brief pauses in between.
The head surgeon performs cutting and touching actions on the patient using a surgical instrument.
The head surgeon performs a continuous sequence of drilling, hammering, and manual tissue manipulation, followed by the calibration of the Mako robotic arm.
The head surgeon calibrates the robotic arm and performs an extended bone sawing procedure with brief pauses for adjustments.
The head surgeon uses a bone saw and robotic arm to cut the patient's bone, followed by brief pauses and continued manual manipulation of the surgical site.
The surgeon drills into the patient's bone, pauses briefly, and then resumes holding an instrument while touching the patient.
The surgeon hammers an instrument into the patient, pauses, and continues to touch and manipulate the surgical site with various instruments.
The head surgeon drills the patient and then inspects the site by touching it.
The head surgeon uses a surgical instrument to touch and cement the patient, with brief pauses in between.
The head surgeon prepares the surgical site by touching the patient, using a hammer, and handling various instruments with brief pauses.
The head surgeon performs drilling on the patient while holding the drill, with short intervals of holding the tool between drilling actions.
The head surgeon inspects the site, briefly pauses, and then proceeds to suture the patient while intermittently touching the area.

level2_segments.summary: The head surgeon prepares the patient and performs initial cutting and tissue manipulation.
The surgeon conducts extensive bone preparation involving drilling, hammering, and robotic arm calibration and sawing.
The head surgeon applies cement, performs final site adjustments, and completes the procedure with suturing.

surgical instrument: robot technician (MPS) is holding; scrub nurse is holding

level1_segments.summary: The robot technician holds the surgical instrument before it is transferred to the nursing staff.
The circulator and scrub nurses repeatedly exchange and jointly hold the instrument during a preparation or handover sequence.
The scrub nurse takes sole possession of the instrument following a brief pause in activity.
The circulator and scrub nurses engage in another series of exchanges and joint handling of the instrument.
The instrument is passed between the circulator and scrub nurse before being held continuously by the scrub nurse for an extended period.
The surgical instrument is held and transferred between the circulator nurse, scrub nurse, and robot technician during a preparation phase.
The instrument is passed among the circulator nurse, scrub nurse, and assistant surgeon as it is prepared for use by the surgical team.
The head surgeon takes possession of the instrument, with brief exchanges involving the assistant surgeon and scrub nurse, before holding it for an extended period.
The surgical instrument is briefly held by the assistant surgeon and then transferred to the scrub nurse.
The surgical instrument is actively used and frequently passed between the head surgeon, assistant surgeon, and scrub nurse during a continuous phase of the procedure.
The surgical instrument undergoes a series of rapid transfers between the assistant surgeon, head surgeon, and scrub nurse before being jointly held by the assistant and head surgeon.
The instrument is actively used by the head surgeon and assistant surgeon with intermittent involvement from the scrub nurse during a prolonged procedural phase.
The assistant surgeon primarily holds and utilizes the instrument, occasionally sharing it with the head surgeon or scrub nurse for specific tasks.
The surgical instrument undergoes a complex handover sequence involving the assistant surgeon, head surgeon, scrub nurse, and robot technician before settling with the assistant surgeon.
The assistant surgeon primarily holds the instrument while intermittently sharing it with the head surgeon and scrub nurse for coordinated surgical tasks.
The surgical instrument is actively passed between the assistant surgeon, head surgeon, scrub nurse, and robot technician during a continuous collaborative task.
The scrub nurse holds the surgical instrument alone after the collaborative activity concludes.
The instrument is transferred from the scrub nurse to the head surgeon and then back to the assistant surgeon for further handling.
The surgical instrument is continuously held and passed between the assistant surgeon, head surgeon, and scrub nurse in a coordinated sequence of transfers and shared handling.
The surgical instrument is actively passed between the assistant surgeon, head surgeon, and scrub nurse during a brief exchange sequence.
The instrument undergoes a prolonged period of handling and transfer among the scrub nurse, circulator nurse, and assistant surgeon with brief idle moments.
The robot technician takes primary control of the instrument, coordinating with the scrub nurse and assistant surgeon before returning it to the scrub nurse.
The surgical instrument is exchanged between the robot technician and the scrub nurse with brief pauses in between.
The surgical instrument undergoes a series of transfers involving the robot technician, scrub nurse, and circulator nurse before being held jointly by the technician and scrub nurse.

level2_segments.summary: The surgical instrument undergoes an extended preparation and handover sequence involving the robot technician, circulator, and scrub nurses before being readied for the surgical team.
The instrument is actively utilized by the head surgeon and assistant surgeon with frequent exchanges and collaborative handling during the main procedural phase.
Following the main procedure, the instrument experiences a period of coordinated transfers and handling among the scrub nurse, assistant surgeon, and head surgeon.
The robot technician assumes primary control of the instrument, coordinating with the nursing staff for final transfers and joint handling.

level1_segments.summary: The robot technician performs initial manipulations of the robotic arm and surgical instruments with brief pauses.
The technician alternates between manipulating the robotic arm and the MPS workstation to configure the system.
The technician briefly adjusts the infrared tracker and then interacts with the MPS workstation.
The robot technician briefly pauses before interacting with the MPS workstation to perform initial setup tasks.
The technician manipulates and calibrates the Mako robotic arm with brief pauses in between.
The robot technician works at the MPS workstation followed by a brief idle period.
The technician assists the scrub nurse while manipulating and touching the Mako robotic arm and holding surgical instruments.
The robot technician briefly touches the Mako robotic arm with a short pause in between.
The technician holds a surgical instrument and manipulates the robotic arm after a period of inactivity.
The robot technician assists the assistant surgeon followed by a brief pause.
The technician performs a series of manipulations on the MPS workstation and infrared tracker with short pauses in between.
The technician interacts with the Mako robotic arm and MPS workstation intermittently over a period of time.
The robot technician briefly manipulates the MPS workstation before a long pause.
The robot technician holds a surgical drape and then pauses briefly.
The robot technician performs a series of short, intermittent touches and manipulations on the MPS workstation.
The robot technician manipulates the Mako robotic arm and infrared tracker, interspersed with brief pauses and workstation adjustments.
The robot technician holds a surgical instrument with brief pauses in between.
The robot technician alternates between manipulating the MPS workstation and the Mako robotic arm with short idle gaps.
The robot technician holds a surgical instrument and briefly manipulates the MPS workstation.
The robot technician manipulates the Mako robotic arm with brief pauses.
The robot technician manipulates the Mako robotic arm with brief pauses in between.
The robot technician performs intermittent interactions with the MPS workstation separated by short idle periods.
The robot technician alternates between manipulating the Mako robotic arm and holding a surgical instrument with brief pauses.
The robot technician continues to alternate between holding surgical instruments and manipulating the Mako robotic arm with short gaps.
The robot technician briefly manipulates the robotic arm and holds a surgical instrument with short pauses in between.
The robot technician interacts with the MPS workstation and then holds a surgical instrument for an extended period with brief interruptions.

level2_segments.summary: The robot technician performs initial system setup, calibration, and configuration of the robotic arm and MPS workstation.
The technician assists the surgical team and performs intermittent adjustments to the robotic arm and workstation during early procedure stages.
The robot technician manages surgical drapes and continuously alternates between manipulating the robotic arm, holding instruments, and monitoring the workstation throughout the main surgical phase.

level1_segments.summary: The scrub nurse continuously prepares the instrument table and handles surgical instruments with brief pauses.
The scrub nurse continuously prepares the instrument table and handles surgical instruments with brief pauses.
The scrub nurse continuously prepares the instrument table and handles surgical instruments throughout the entire observed period.
The scrub nurse prepares the instrument table and handles various surgical instruments.
The scrub nurse manipulates the Mako robotic arm with brief pauses in between.
The scrub nurse alternates between preparing the instrument table, holding a bone saw, and manipulating the Mako robotic arm.
The scrub nurse assists the assistant surgeon while holding surgical instruments and briefly preparing the table.
The scrub nurse alternates between assisting the assistant surgeon and preparing the instrument table.
The scrub nurse alternates between holding instruments, assisting the head surgeon, and preparing the instrument table with brief pauses.
The scrub nurse assists the head surgeon and then prepares the patient.
The scrub nurse prepares the instrument table, holds instruments, and manipulates the Mako robotic arm with intermittent pauses.
The scrub nurse briefly assists the head surgeon.
The scrub nurse prepares the instrument table with brief pauses in between.
The scrub nurse alternates between assisting the head surgeon with instruments and drills, and preparing the instrument table.
The scrub nurse continuously alternates between assisting the head surgeon with instruments and preparing the instrument table, including a brief pause.
The scrub nurse assists the head surgeon by holding instruments and briefly prepares the instrument table.
The scrub nurse briefly assists the surgeon and then prepares the instrument table with a short pause in between.
The scrub nurse engages in a series of short, intermittent tasks involving instrument preparation and assisting the surgeon, separated by brief idle moments.
The scrub nurse continuously assists the head surgeon by holding various instruments like drills and hammers while simultaneously preparing the instrument table, with only brief pauses in between.
The scrub nurse prepares the instrument table and assists the surgeon by holding various instruments including a hammer.
The scrub nurse continuously assists the head surgeon and manages the instrument table by holding various tools and organizing the setup throughout the procedure.
The scrub nurse continuously prepares the instrument table and assists the surgical team by holding various instruments.
The scrub nurse prepares the instrument table and handles surgical instruments with brief pauses in between.
The scrub nurse continues preparing the instrument table after a short gap.
The scrub nurse alternates between holding surgical instruments and preparing the instrument table in a continuous workflow.

level2_segments.summary: The scrub nurse focuses on initial instrument table preparation and handling surgical tools before the main procedure begins.
The nurse transitions to active support by manipulating the robotic arm, assisting the surgical team, and managing instrument readiness.
The scrub nurse provides continuous assistance to the head surgeon with various instruments while maintaining the instrument table throughout the core surgical phase.
The nurse concludes the procedure by finalizing instrument preparation and handling tools during the closing stages.

level1_segments.summary: The robot monitor is initialized and finalized in two consecutive start-finish cycles.
A comprehensive pre-surgery calibration sequence is performed, including arm status, homing, accuracy, brake, and angle checks, concluding with a successful verification.
The system proceeds through an extended bone registration process involving multiple anatomical landmarks and timeout events, followed by a brief transition to intra-operative planning.
The robot monitor displays the progression of bone registration tasks, including distal and posterior bevel views, followed by intra-operative planning and the completion of the registration phase.
The robot monitor transitions to the 'Start' screen, indicating the initiation of the next surgical phase.

level2_segments.summary: The robot monitor undergoes initialization and a comprehensive pre-surgery calibration sequence to verify system readiness.
The system executes an extended bone registration process involving anatomical landmarks and transitions into intra-operative planning.
The robot monitor transitions to the 'Start' screen, marking the initiation of the next surgical phase.
